query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "occ-rag: optimal cognitive core for faithful question answering" linguistics
rationale: The paper focuses on general data augmentation and sampling strategies for domain-agnostic QA models, which does not address the user's specific inquiry into "OCC-RAG," "Optimal Cognitive Core," or the linguistic mechanisms of faithful question answering. It fails to meet any inclusion criteria (a-f) as it neither measures the specific cognitive core mechanism, studies the specific RAG architecture, nor provides a foundational baseline for the "OCC-RAG" framework mentioned in the prompt.
